workers.name: FCMTokenCleanupWorker
workers.description: Scheduled cron job running on Supabase PostgreSQL (pg_cron) to find and purge expired Firebase Cloud Messaging push tokens from user_push_tokens.

workers.name: MilestoneReminderWorker
workers.description: Scans milestones due within 24 hours and inserts alerts into notification_queue.

workers.name: InactiveRoomArchiverWorker
workers.description: Identifies chat rooms with no message activity in the last 60 days and updates status to 'archived'.
